hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-black tracking-tighter text-slate-900 leading-tight
hierarchy.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tight text-slate-900
hierarchy.label: text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-bold text-orange-500

spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-align dense content. Symmetrical or left-aligned Hero. No center-everything.

components.navigation: Solid white background (bg-white) with border-b. High contrast logo. Navigation links in Slate-600 hover:text-orange-500.

buttons.primary: bg-orange-500 hover:bg-orange-600 text-white font-bold uppercase tracking-wider rounded-sm px-8 py-4 transition-all flex items-center justify-center gap-2
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border-2 border-slate-900 text-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-900 hover:text-white font-bold uppercase tracking-wider rounded-sm px-8 py-4 transition-all flex items-center justify-center gap-2

components.cards: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-sm p-8 hover:shadow-lg hover:border-orange-500 transition-all duration-300 group flex flex-col items-start

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Buttons translate-y-[-2px] with increased shadow. Service cards border turns to orange-500 on group-hover.
motion_and_interactions.scroll_animations: Staggered fade-up for bento grid sections and project gallery.
motion_and_interactions.accessibility: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Ensure ARIA labels on social links.

hero.subheadline: Pan-India construction and infrastructure services delivering premium earthwork and surface finishes.

about.description: Harshita Infrastructure stands at the forefront of India's development. From large-scale soil dumping to precision white cement and wall putty finishes, we provide comprehensive solutions that form the backbone of modern construction.

items.title: Soil Dumping
items.desc: Earth filling, site levelling, and heavy earthmoving operations for residential and commercial projects.

items.title: White Cement
items.desc: Premium wall finishes and architectural grade cement application for structural durability.

items.title: Wall Putty
items.desc: Expert surface preparation creating flawless canvases for painting and final coating.

testing.attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute matching kebab-case role. Example: data-testid='whatsapp-cta', data-testid='service-card-soil'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard HTML tags (div, section) styled with Tailwind for layout structure instead of strict UI cards everywhere to maintain the rugged construction aesthetic.
Implement lucide-react icons for visual anchors (e.g., HardHat, Truck, Phone, Mail).
Create a sticky header with the provided logo URL.

Ensure the Hero section has high contrast for readability. Use a split layout with typography on a white/light background and the hero image alongside it, OR if using a full background, apply a bg-slate-900/80 heavy overlay.
Apply 'rounded-sm' consistently to containers and buttons to convey an industrial, blocky, and solid feel.
Apply 'data-testid' to ALL buttons, links, and forms for testing.
